notes: This is a template MCP configuration for Kiro.
Replace YOUR_*_HERE placeholders with actual API keys.
Set 'disabled: false' to enable a server.
Adjust file paths and connection strings as needed.
For more MCP servers, see mcp-configs/mcp-servers.json in the ai-code repository.
